fbMarketplaceSearch.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 17_2 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Mobile/21C66 [FBAN/FBIOS;...]
fbMarketplaceSearch.notes: Facebook's marketplace GraphQL endpoint is accessible via mobile carrier IPs. Desktop/datacenter IPs trigger login redirect; mobile carrier IPs (T-Mobile AS21928) serve marketplace content matching the mobile app experience.

sampleResult.title: iPhone 15 Pro Max 256GB Natural Titanium - Unlocked
sampleResult.description: iPhone 15 Pro Max 256GB in Natural Titanium. Used for 3 months, no scratches or dents. Comes with original box, cable, and Apple Care until March 2025. Face ID works perfectly. Unlocked for all carriers.

fbListingDetail.method: OG meta tag extraction + JSON-LD structured data
fbListingDetail.notes: Individual listing pages include og:title, og:description, og:image plus JSON-LD schema.org/Product data. Accessible without auth via mobile carrier IP.

fbCategories.method: static catalog (20 categories — stable Facebook Marketplace taxonomy)

fbNewListings.endpoint: Reuses /search with sort_by=CREATION_TIME + client-side time filtering
fbNewListings.notes: Facebook's GraphQL API supports sorting by CREATION_TIME. Combined with local timestamp filtering, this enables real-time monitoring of new listings within any time window.
